metadata.description: External Claude Code skills repository for research planning and adjacent workflows. Forkable customer-facing skills drawing on UI's published research methodology.

plugins.name: research-planning
plugins.description: Turn a research question into a structured research brief through a conversational interview that adapts to your workspace and the tools you actually have available. Uses User Interviews' published planning playbook — refuses honestly when research isn't the right move, recommends desk research when context is missing, and produces a portable brief when primary research is warranted.
